imagePrompts.prompt: Create a reusable editorial portrait image set with controlled variables while preserving the source prompt's visual recipe. theme: A reusable editorial portrait image set built around adult East Asian woman with soft waves. signature elements: adult editorial portrait system with stable subject identity, controlled wardrobe/motion panels, refined retouching, and consistent mood composition: stable composition, subject-led layout, controlled crop, strong focal hierarchy, and clean surrounding space for labels or supporting panels. style: Editorial portrait photography system with consistent adult subject styling, controlled wardrobe and pose variation, refined retouching, and cohesive mood direction. restrictions: no watermark, no random extra text, no distorted anatomy, no copied copyrighted composition, avoid real logos and replace brands with fictional or generic marks when publishing, adult subjects only, no face swap, no real-person likeness unless the user owns or has consent for the image subject: adult East Asian woman with soft waves as the primary visual subject, kept clear and recognizable while the template style remains stable wardrobe: ivory satin blouse and pearl earrings. pose or panel system: studio portrait plus two detail panels. scene: warm rose spotlight defines the surrounding context, supporting details, and sense of place color palette: controlled black, white, and subtle red-seal accents lighting: lighting supports the template mood with controlled highlights, readable details, and no overexposed glow camera: camera crop and viewpoint are chosen to keep the subject readable and preserve the source prompt perspective materials: specific material surfaces, reflections, texture, and product-grade finish remain legible Keep the visual style consistent with the template while changing only the listed variables.
